---
title: "Gabriel Massaine Moulatlet"
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
::: {.profile-left}
![](../images/equipo/gabriel.jpeg){.profile-photo-large}

::: {.profile-links}
[✉](mailto:mandprogabriel@gmail.com)  
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=o4dBz6MAAAAJ)  
[gamamo.netlify.app](https://gamamo.netlify.app/)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-right}
**Postdoctoral Researcher**  
Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (INECOL)

*Interests:* [Numerical Ecology]{.profile-tag} [Macroecology]{.profile-tag} [Diversity gradients]{.profile-tag} [Environmental Impact Assessments]{.profile-tag}

I am a biologist with broad interest in several aspects of tropical ecology. Most of my experience has been from studying species diversity in tierra-firme Amazonian forests in Brazil and in the Andes of Ecuador. To understand broad aspects of species distribution, I got interested in remote sensing, biogeography and in the mapping of environmental conditions.

### Education

- **PhD** — University of Turku, Finland (2017)
- **MSc** — INPA, Manaus, Brasil (2012)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-back}
[← Back to Team](../equipo.html)
:::
